name: Death by Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat the outside of the ladyfingers with rum and arrange them flat side down around the sides and bottom of a 10-inch springform pan.
2. Melt butter in a medium saucepan over low heat, then remove from heat and stir in chocolate chips until melted and slightly cooled.
3. Beat egg yolks into the chocolate mixture one at a time until fully incorporated.
4. In a separate bowl, beat egg whites until stiff but not dry peaks form.
5. Gently fold the egg white mixture into the chocolate batter.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared springform pan and refrigerate for at least 6 hours.
7. Whip heavy cream until thickened, then add sugar and vanilla extract. Continue whipping until very stiff.
8. Remove cake from pan and place on a serving platter. Spread whipped cream evenly over the entire cake surface.
9. Pipe additional whipped cream decoratively around the edges of the cake as desired.
10. Melt remaining chocolate chips and vegetable oil in a double boiler, then let cool completely.
11. Drizzle the melted chocolate mixture down the sides of the cake.
12. Garnish with stemmed candied cherries.
13. Store in the refrigerator until serving.
